prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年基准位次570名、2026年大幅扩招26.8%的缓解作用、本省物理类考生大幅增加约46%带来的竞争加剧、工科优势专业持续吸引 高分考生，以及声誉偏负面可能轻微抑制，预计2026年物理类最低位次在570名基础上小幅后移；预测最低位次约672名，区间605–739名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text:
From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for Physics Category were approximately 890 → 662 → 624 → 530 → 570, showing an overall trend of moving forward then slightly rebounding. In 2025, it moved back about 40 places compared to 2024, with a baseline ranking of about 570. The enrollment plan for this university in Jiangsu Physics Category was 42 in 2021, 38 in 2022, 38 in 2023, 39 in 2024, and 41 in 2025. In 2026, the plan significantly increases to 52, an expansion of about 26.8% compared to 2025, notably alleviating competitive pressure.
3. [School Level] Zhejiang University is a 985, 211, and Double First-Class university, consistently ranking 3rd in the Soft Science Chinese University Rankings for many years, belonging to the top national tier.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: In 2026, the reputation evaluation is somewhat negative, involving incidents of academic misconduct, teacher ethics, and campus safety. Its Douyin popularity ranks 14th (high heat), with high attention on short video platforms. Historical admission anomaly records are neutral. It has numerous A+/A disciplines such as Computer Science and Technology A+, Software Engineering A+, Control Science and Engineering A+, Optical Engineering A+, Electrical Engineering A, Mechanical Engineering A+, and Clinical Medicine A, making its engineering strength top in the country.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Zhejiang University's advantageous engineering majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, and Electrical Engineering are all highly recommended or recommended, with sustained high application heat. In 2026, the total number of Jiangsu ordinary college entrance exam candidates is about 521,000, with Physics Category estimated at about 380,000 based on the recent proportion of about 73%, a significant increase of about 46% compared to 2025's 261,000, markedly intensifying competition. The provincial control line for Physics Category undergraduate batch has risen from 417 to 463 points in recent years, showing an upward trend. Zhejiang University is located in Hangzhou, Zhejiang, adjacent to Jiangsu, with strong regional preference. Its enrollment proportion in Jiangsu Physics Category is about 6%, making it one of the key provinces for out-of-province enrollment.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline ranking of 570, the significant 26.8% expansion in 2026 alleviating pressure, the sharp 46% increase in local Physics Category candidates intensifying competition, the sustained attraction of high-scoring students by advantageous engineering majors, and the slightly negative reputation possibly having a mild suppressing effect, it is expected that the minimum ranking for Physics Category in 2026 will slightly move back from 570. The predicted minimum ranking is about 672, with a range of 605–739.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:

- Engineering Experimental Class (Chu Kochen Honors College Mixed Class) (Free choice of science and engineering majors)
- Engineering Experimental Class (Intelligent Robotics) (Embodied Intelligence, Robotics Engineering)
- Engineering Experimental Class (Computer) (Computer Science and Technology, Software Engineering, Information Security).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Moderate)
- Engineering Experimental Class (EE Category) (Electrical Engineering and Automation, etc.)
- Engineering Experimental Class (Automation and Optoelectronics)
- Engineering Experimental Class (Intelligent Science and Innovation) (Artificial Intelligence, etc.)
- Engineering Experimental Class (Brain-Computer Intelligence Innovation Class) (Psychology, Biomedical Engineering).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easy to Enter)
- Agricultural Engineering (Agricultural Intelligent Robot Innovation Class)
- Agricultural Resources and Environment (including Chu Kochen Honors College New Agriculture Experimental Class).
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: For rankings within the predicted range of 605–739, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors such as EE Category, Automation, and Intelligent Science as the main choices. Tier 1 Chu Kochen Honors College Turing Class and Mixed Class can be used as reach options, while Tier 3 Agricultural Engineering and Resources and Environment serve as safety choices. For rankings significantly better than the lower limit (e.g., within 580), prioritize reaching for top-tier computer majors. For rankings near the upper limit (e.g., above 720), focus on stable Tier 2 majors.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for History Category were approximately 426 → 447 → 472 → 445 → 540, showing a fluctuating and then declining trend. In 2025, the ranking shifted back by about 95 places compared to 2024, with a baseline ranking of approximately 540. The enrollment plan for History Category in Jiangsu was 36 in 2021, 35 in 2022, 35 in 2023, 35 in 2024, and 36 in 2025. In 2026, the plan increases to 40, an expansion of about 11.1% compared to 2025, which alleviates competition to some extent.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Zhejiang University is a 985, 211, and Double First-Class university, consistently ranked 3rd in the Shanghai Ranking for many years, placing it at the top national level. In 2026, its reputation evaluation is somewhat negative, involving incidents of academic misconduct, teacher ethics, and campus safety. It ranks 14th in Douyin popularity (high heat), with high attention on short video platforms. Historical admission anomalies are neutral. It has numerous A+/A disciplines such as Computer Science and Technology, Software Engineering, Control Science and Engineering, Optical Engineering, Clinical Medicine, and Pharmacy. In the humanities, Foreign Languages and Literature is A+, Law is A, and Chinese Language and Literature is A, demonstrating top-tier academic strength.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Popularity of humanities majors like Law, Chinese Language/Literature is recommended or differentiated with caution. In 2026, the total number of regular college entrance exam takers in Jiangsu is about 521,000, a significant increase of about 45% from approximately 358,000 in 2025. History Category, estimated at about 27% of the total, has about 141,000 candidates, intensifying competition. The provincial control line for History Category undergraduate batch has risen slightly from 476 to 482 in recent years. Zhejiang University is located in Hangzhou, Zhejiang, adjacent to Jiangsu, with strong regional preference. Its enrollment proportion in Jiangsu is about 6% (2025 data), making it one of the key provinces for out-of-province enrollment.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline ranking of 540, the mitigating effect of an 11.1% enrollment expansion in 2026, the intensified competition due to a roughly 45% increase in local History Category candidates, the slightly negative reputation that may mildly suppress application enthusiasm, and the increased attention reflected by high Douyin heat, the minimum ranking for History Category in 2026 is expected to shift back slightly from the baseline of 540. The predicted minimum ranking is approximately 591, with a range of 532–650.
